common.artsCsFull: AI Resistant Teaching System for Computer Science

landing.heroDesc: ARTS-CS: An AI-Resistant Teaching System where you teach virtual agents Python, SQL, and AI concepts. Agents learn through explicit knowledge states — resistant to shortcuts, designed for deep mastery.
landing.threeDomainsDesc: Teach agents across different computer science disciplines with domain-specific knowledge models
landing.pythonDesc: Variables, I/O, loops, conditions, functions, data structures
landing.aiLiteracyDesc: Prompt engineering, AI capabilities, ethical considerations
landing.lbtDesc: The most effective way to learn is to teach
landing.interactiveTeachingDesc: Explain concepts to a virtual agent that starts with zero knowledge. Teaching deepens your own understanding.
landing.adaptiveKnowledgeDesc: Bayesian knowledge tracing monitors mastery. Agent responses are constrained by what you've taught.
landing.liveCodeTestingDesc: Challenge the agent with programming problems. Watch it generate code based only on your teaching.
landing.misconceptionEngineDesc: Complete lifecycle from activation to relearning
landing.misconceptionDetectionDesc: Automatically detects and tracks student misconceptions through teaching interactions and test failures.
landing.activationBehaviorDesc: Misconceptions activate based on teaching input, then manifest in the Teachable Agent's code generation and problem-solving.
landing.correctionRelearningDesc: Targeted teaching corrects misconceptions. Forgetting and relearning complete the full lifecycle.
landing.assessmentPracticeDesc: Multiple assessment types for comprehensive evaluation
landing.parsonsPuzzlesDesc: Drag-and-drop code blocks to build correct program structure. Tests understanding of syntax order.
landing.executionTracesDesc: Predict output or identify bugs by tracing code execution line by line.
landing.fillInBlankDesc: Complete partially written code to test specific concept understanding.
landing.instructorDashboardDesc: Track student progress, identify misconceptions, review teaching transcripts, and ensure assessment integrity with AI-resistant proctoring.
landing.studentAnalyticsDesc: Track class-wide progress, identify struggling students, view detailed mastery breakdowns.
landing.learningTrajectoriesDesc: Visualize each student's learning journey with timeline views and concept mastery progression.
landing.aiResistantProctoringDesc: Detect suspicious patterns that may indicate AI-assisted cheating. Maintain assessment integrity.
landing.teachingTranscriptsDesc: Review complete teaching dialogues between students and their Teachable Agents for assessment insights.
landing.tryItNowDesc: Use these demo accounts to explore all features instantly
landing.readyDesc: Join researchers and educators using ARTS-CS to implement "Learning by Teaching" with AI-resistant assessment and misconception tracking.
landing.copyright: © 2026 ARTS-CS. AI Resistant Teaching System for Computer Science.

login.signInDesc: Sign in to ARTS-CS — teach AI agents, track mastery.
login.brandLine: AI Resistant Teaching System for CS

dashboard.title: Learning Dashboard
dashboard.continueTeaching: Continue teaching your AI agent and track your mastery progress.
dashboard.noTADesc: Create your first AI teaching assistant to start your learning journey. Select a domain (Python, SQL, or AI Literacy) and begin teaching.
dashboard.demoModeDesc: Running with pre-defined responses. Configure an LLM API key for intelligent conversations.
dashboard.gettingStartedDesc: Teach your agent a concept (e.g. variables), then run a test to see how well it learned.
dashboard.activityDesc: Your engagement over the last 7 days
dashboard.recentActivityDesc: Your latest teaching and testing sessions
dashboard.noActivityDesc: Start by teaching your agent a concept
dashboard.misconceptionsDetectedDesc: Address these to improve your understanding

teach.title: Teach Your AI Agent
teach.desc: Explain concepts clearly — the agent starts with zero knowledge

tips.1: Explain concepts as if teaching a beginner
tips.2: Use specific examples to illustrate ideas
tips.3: Ask the Teachable Agent questions to check understanding
tips.4: Connect new concepts to what the Teachable Agent already knows

teach.startTeaching: Start teaching your Teachable Agent by explaining a programming concept...

test.title: Test Your Agent
test.desc: Verify what your Teachable Agent has learned through programming challenges
test.allDesc: All: Comprehensive evaluation across all unlocked problems
test.comprehensiveReportDesc: Detailed breakdown of all test cases
test.readyDesc: Select a problem from the dropdown above and run a test to see how well your Teachable Agent has learned.
test.readyHint: Or use "Run All" for a comprehensive evaluation across all unlocked problems

mastery.title: Mastery Overview
mastery.desc: Track your learning progress and knowledge state visualization
mastery.knowledgeGraphDesc: Visual representation of your agent's knowledge state
mastery.conceptMasteryDesc: Mastery level for each knowledge unit
mastery.insightsDesc: Based on your current progress, here are some recommendations:
mastery.addressMisconceptionsDesc: You have {{count}} active misconceptions. Focus on correcting these first.
mastery.continueInProgressDesc: {{count}} concepts are partially learned. Keep teaching to master them.
mastery.exploreNewDesc: {{count}} concepts are waiting. Start teaching to expand your knowledge.
mastery.excellentProgressDesc: Your {{rate}}% pass rate shows strong understanding. Keep it up!

analytics.title: Learning Analytics Center
analytics.desc: AI-powered learning insights and personalized recommendations
analytics.crossDomainDesc: Based on your mastery in the {{domain}} domain

history.title: Learning History
history.desc: View all your teaching and testing sessions.
history.noEvents: No events yet. Teach or run tests to see history.

onboarding.chooseDomainDesc: Select a domain to start teaching your AI assistant. You can create multiple Teachable Agents for different domains later.
onboarding.settingUp: We're setting up your {{domain}} learning environment
onboarding.taReadyDesc: Start teaching your {{domain}} Teachable Agent concepts, then run tests to see how well it learned.
onboarding.pythonDesc: Learn Python fundamentals through teaching — variables, loops, functions, and data structures.
onboarding.sqlDesc: Master SQL queries by teaching — SELECT, JOINs, aggregation, and schema design.
onboarding.aiDesc: Understand AI concepts by teaching — prompt engineering, capabilities, and ethics.

tutorial.step1Desc: This is an AI-Resistant Teaching System where you play the role of a teacher. You'll teach a zero-knowledge Teachable Agent programming concepts to deepen your own understanding.
tutorial.step2Desc: Start by selecting a learning domain: Python, SQL, or AI Literacy. Each domain has its own knowledge units and practice problems.
tutorial.step3Desc: Go to the Teach page and explain concepts in your own words. The better you teach, the faster the Teachable Agent learns. The side panel shows real-time knowledge state changes.
tutorial.step4Desc: Visit the Test page to run programming tests. The Teachable Agent will attempt to solve problems based only on what you've taught it.
tutorial.step5Desc:
Try the Practice page for interactive exercises:
- Parsons Puzzles (arrange code blocks)
- Fill-in-the-Blank
- Execution Traces
tutorial.step6Desc: The Mastery page shows your learning progress with knowledge graphs and radar charts for each concept's mastery level.
tutorial.step7Desc: The Analytics center provides deep insights: learning pace, cognitive load, concept relations, 3D knowledge graphs — helping you optimize your learning strategy.
tutorial.step8Desc: Start teaching now! Every page has a help button in the bottom-right corner — click it anytime for usage instructions.
tutorial.skipGuide: Skip guide (you can restart it later)

dashboard.title: Dashboard Help
dashboard.content: This is your learning overview. Check progress stats, view recent activity, and quickly jump to Teach, Test, or Practice pages.
steps: Review your mastery progress at the top
Check recommended practice on the right

teach.title: Teach Page Help
teach.content: Type your explanations in the chat on the left. The right panel shows the Teachable Agent's knowledge state in real time.
steps: Explain a concept clearly in the chat box

test.title: Test Page Help
test.content: Select a problem or click 'Run All'. The Teachable Agent will attempt to write code based on what you've taught.
steps: Choose a problem from the dropdown
Review the Teachable Agent's code and test results

practice.title: Practice Page Help
practice.content: Choose an exercise type (Parsons Puzzle, Fill-in-the-Blank, Execution Trace) and complete interactive exercises to reinforce understanding.
steps: Submit your answer and review feedback

mastery.title: Mastery Page Help
mastery.content: The knowledge graph shows all concepts. Green = mastered, Yellow = in progress, Red = misconception detected.
steps: Read the learning insights at the bottom

history.title: History Page Help
history.content: View all your teaching and testing sessions chronologically.
steps: Filter by event type if needed

analytics.title: Analytics Page Help
analytics.content: Deep learning analytics: pace, cognitive load, concept relations, achievements. Helps you find learning bottlenecks.
steps: Switch between tabs for different insights

practice.title: Practice
practice.desc: Strengthen your understanding with structured exercises
practice.quickStartDesc: Three steps to practice coding assessments
practice.stepPickDesc: Choose a task from the list. Use the AI resistance slider to find challenging items.
practice.stepSolveDesc: Drag blocks, fill blanks, or trace execution — depending on the task type.
practice.stepCheckDesc: Submit your answer for instant feedback. Use hints if you get stuck.
practice.reopenHint: You can always re-open this from the sidebar

teacher.noKnowledgeData: No knowledge state data. Student may not have taught yet.
teacher.activeForTA: Active for this Teachable Agent instance.
teacher.teachCorrect: Have the student teach the correct concept.
teacher.title: Title
teacher.metricsDesc: Assessment quality, AI difficulty distribution, and student interaction signals.
teacher.noTelemetryData: No student interaction data yet. Complete a few practice attempts to populate this panel.
teacher.proctoringDesc: Monitor student behavior and maintain assessment integrity

assessment.lockedDesc: The assessment view was hidden after this browser tab lost focus. Resume only when you are ready to continue.
assessment.noHintsAvailable: Choose a hint type above. Hints are limited to help you learn independently.

levelScope.problemDesc: Broad concept only — no specific elements
levelScope.blockDesc: Points to a general area — no exact answers
levelScope.lineDesc: Names one element — still no answer revealed

assessment.checkpointsDesc: Checkpoints — fill in each variable value after the line executes:
assessment.dragBlocksHint: Click or drag blocks above to add them here. Drag to reorder.
